title: Tala 10 Inch / 25cm Square Cake Drum, Extra Strong with 12mm Thickness, with Silver Foil Base, Perfect Cake Board for Heavy Cakes
features: CAKE BOARD: The most traditional way of display a freshly baked cake
EXTRA THICKNESS: The Tala Cake Drumm and made to 12mm for extra strenght and perfect for holding the heavier cakes
MEASURMENTS - This Cake Board Measures 10 x 10 Inches (25cm x 25cm)
EMBOSSED SILVER FOIL: These Cakes Boards have a embossed silver foil finish which gives a great background for any freshly baked Cake
TALA: Known and trusted for Baking and Icing products since 1899
